zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Ralph Heathcote於1465年出生在英國英格蘭德比夏爾德比時，他的父親Thomas Heathcote25歲，母親Mrs. Rose Heathcote21歲。他和Ellen Thompson至少有6個兒子和6個女兒。他去世於1525年在他的家鄉享年60歲。

nameMeanings.name: Heathcote
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Heathcote in Hartington (Derbyshire), Heathcote in Warwick (Warwickshire), or Heathcote Farm in Wasperton (Warwickshire). The placenames derive from Old English hǣth ‘heath, heather’ + cot ‘cottage, hut, shelter’. In Yorkshire, this name is pronounced Hethkett.

variants.name: Hathcoat
meanings: Probably an altered form of   Heathcote  .

variants.name: Heathcott
meanings: English (Derbyshire and Lancashire): variant of   Heathcote  .

variants.name: Heathcoat
meanings: English (Yorkshire and Lancashire): variant of   Heathcote  .

nameMeanings.name: Ralph
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

variants.name: Ralf
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Ralph Heathcote was born in 1465, in Derby, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Thomas Heathcote, was 25 and his mother, Mrs. Rose Heathcote, was 21. He had at least 6 sons and 6 daughters with Ellen Thompson. He died in 1525, in his hometown, at the age of 60.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Ralph Heathcote est né en 1465, à Derby, Derbyshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Thomas Heathcote, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Mrs. Rose Heathcote, avait 21 ans. Il a eu au moins 6 fils et 6 filles avec Ellen Thompson. Il est décédé en 1525, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 60 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Ralph Heathcote 1465 in Derby, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas Heathcote 25 und seine Mutter Mrs. Rose Heathcote 21. Er hatte mit Ellen Thompson mindestens 6 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Er starb 1525 im Alter von 60 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Ralph Heathcote è nato il nel 1465 nel Derby, Derbyshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Thomas Heathcote, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Mrs. Rose Heathcote, aveva 21 anni. Lui avuto almeno 6 figli e 6 figlie con Ellen Thompson. Morì nel 1525, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 60 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Ralph Heathcoteが1465年にイギリスイギリスデルブイシュアイアデルビーで生まれた時，父Thomas Heathcoteは25歳，母Mrs. Rose Heathcoteは21歳であった。彼はEllen Thompsonとの間に少なくとも6人の息子と6人の娘をもうけた。彼は1525年に故郷で60歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Ralph Heathcote(이)가 1465년 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르 더비에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Heathcote(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs. Rose Heathcote(은)는 21세였다. 그는 Ellen Thompson(와)과 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1525년 그의 고향에서 60세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Ralph Heathcote nasceu em 1465, em Derby, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Thomas Heathcote, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Mrs. Rose Heathcote, tinha 21 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 6 filhos e 6 filhas com Ellen Thompson. Ele faleceu em 1525, em sua cidade natal, com 60 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Ralph Heathcote родился в 1465 г. в местности дирби, дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Thomas Heathcote было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs. Rose Heathcote, 21. У него было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 6 дочерей от Ellen Thompson. Он умер в 1525 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 60 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Ralph Heathcote nació en 1465, en Derby, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Thomas Heathcote, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Mrs. Rose Heathcote, tenía 21 años. Tuvo por lo menos 6 hijos y 6 hijas con Ellen Thompson. Murió en 1525, en su pueblo, a la edad de 60 años.
